heading: Cadets: degree and commission on graduation
label: 9453 Cadets: degree and commission on graduation
notes: Historical and Revision Notes1956ActRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)9353(a)9353(b)10:486a (less last sentence).10:506c(f) (1st sentence, less last 43 words).(less last sentence); restated (less last sentence); restated ; restated (less last sentence), .May 25, 1933, ch. 37Aug. 9, 1946, ch. 932Aug. 4, 1949, ch. 393, § 13Aug. 18, 1949, ch. 47663 Stat. 615(1st sentence, less last 43 words), .Aug. 7, 1947, ch. 512, § 506(f)61 Stat. 892In subsection (a), the last 27 words are substituted for 10:486a (last sentence). The words “rules and” and “from and after the date of the accrediting of said Academy” are omitted as surplusage. The word “conditions” is substituted for the word “regulations”.In subsection (b), the words “except ” are inserted to reflect the authority to appoint graduates of one service academy as officers of another service.section 541 of this title

1958ActRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)9353(b)10 App.:1850c(e) (1st sentence).(1st sentence), .July 20, 1956, ch. 646, § 203(e)70 Stat. 585It is unnecessary to include a reference to , since that section does not derogate from the authority granted in this section.section 541 of title 10The change reflects the opinion of the Judge Advocate General of the Air Force () that the words “from and after the date of the accrediting of said academies” in the source law for section 9353(a) ( (), as amended) were a condition precedent to the authority to grant degrees and should not have been omitted.July 19, 1957Act of May 25, 1933, ch. 3748 Stat. 73

children.label: a
children.text: The Superintendent of the Academy may, under such conditions as the Secretary of the Air Force may prescribe, confer the degree of bachelor of science upon graduates of the Academy.

children.label: b
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, a cadet who completes the prescribed course of instruction may, upon graduation, be appointed a second lieutenant in the Regular Air Force under or a second lieutenant in the Space Force under section 531 or 20201 of this title.section 531 of this title
